about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Guangzhou Qiuyan Technology Co., Ltd.
about.description: Founded in 2015, Guangzhou Qiuyan Technology Co., Ltd. is a leading manufacturer of CNC tool smart cabinets and intelligent storage solutions. We specialize in R&D, production, and sales of smart storage equipment for manufacturing enterprises.
about.missionText: To provide intelligent, efficient, and reliable tool management solutions that help manufacturers reduce costs, improve efficiency, and ensure traceability.
about.visionText: To become the global leader in intelligent storage solutions, empowering smart manufacturing worldwide.
about.certificationsText: We are ISO quality management system certified with 5 major management system certifications. Our products are protected by multiple patents and software copyrights, ensuring the highest quality and innovation.

valueChain.title: How We Deliver Value Through CNC Tool Management
valueChain.step1Desc: Employees can collect tools after authentication. A detailed issuance record is automatically generated once the process is completed.
valueChain.step2Desc: The system monitors the real-time stock of tools in the cabinet. When the inventory reaches the warning threshold, an alarm is triggered.
valueChain.step3Desc: Restockers then replenish the tools, and the inventory is updated synchronously after restocking.
valueChain.closedLoop: This achieves a closed-loop management of 'issuance – recovery – monitoring – restocking', effectively solving the problems of tool issuance and inventory replenishment.

about.hero.description: Founded in 2015, Guangzhou Qiuyan Technology is a leading manufacturer of CNC tool smart cabinets.
about.intro.paragraph1: As a group-operated national high-tech enterprise, we have attained certifications for five management systems, including ISO Quality Management System, and hold dozens of patents and software copyrights.
about.intro.paragraph2: We specialize in developing and manufacturing a full line of intelligent unmanned management cabinets—such as intelligent material cabinets, intelligent tool cabinets, and intelligent storage cabinets.
about.timeline.2015.title: Company Founded
about.timeline.2015.description: Guangzhou Qiuyan Technology established, focusing on R&D and manufacturing of CNC smart storage equipment.
about.timeline.2018.title: Technology Breakthrough
about.timeline.2018.description: Self-developed RFID recognition technology for precise tool tracking.
about.timeline.2024.title: Global Expansion
about.timeline.2024.description: Products exported to 60+ countries with global service network.

home.solutions.title: Industry Solutions
home.solutions.subtitle: Tailored smart storage solutions for every industry
solutions.items.cabinet-type.desc: From standard smart cabinets to tool management and material storage units. Dual RFID and barcode recognition for every scenario.
solutions.items.managed-items.desc: Fine-grained management for CNC inserts, drills, taps and high-value consumables. Real-time tracking, auto-alerts, error-proof dispensing.
solutions.items.industry.desc: Custom smart storage for automotive, aerospace, precision machining. Seamless MES/WMS integration out of the box.
solutions.items.custom-solution.desc: End-to-end customization from design to deployment, tailored to your line layout, process workflow and management needs.
solutions.items.robots.desc: AGV/AMR robot connectivity for automated tool delivery and line-side replenishment — a core building block for lights-out factories.
solutions.items.laboratory.desc: Sample, reagent and tool management for precision labs and test centers. Role-based access with full audit trail.
solutions.items.cleanroom.desc: ESD-safe, particle-free design meeting ISO cleanroom standards. Built for semiconductor, optics and pharma R&D and production.
solutions.items.other.desc: Smart lockers, document security cabinets, hazardous material control — covering every enterprise storage category.
